chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 873 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.3811/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 12.08.2025 Mr. Khalil Ahmed Kobhar, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr. Khalil Ahmed Metlo, Deputy PG for State >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG and Deputy PG file statements on behalf of Respondents No.1 and 2, taken on record. SIP Ashique Ali of Police Station, Daharki / Investigating Officer of Crime No.84 of 2025 under Section 216-A PPC is present and files statement, taken on record and submits that final challan in the impugned FIR has been submitted before the concerned Court having jurisdiction; besides the petitioner who is nominated accused of the said FIR has been granted bail by the Court below. Learned Assistant AG and Assistant PG submit that in view of the dicta laid down by Honourable Supreme Court in the case of Director General, Anti-Corruption Establishment Lahore and others vs. Muhammad Akram Khan and others (PLD 2013 Supreme Court 401), the purpose of filing instant petition is over and seek its disposal. Learned counsel for the petitioner when confronted with above legal position, he seeks disposal of this petition. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
